---
title: "AiRR Demo Session Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y %H:%M')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    self_contained: true
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    includes:
      in_header: viewport.html
params:
  login_id: NULL
  brand_name: NULL
  email: NULL
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.airr-card-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 12px;
  margin: 20px 0;
}
.airr-card-main {
  background: #1A1A1A;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 30px;
  color: #F5F5F0;
  text-align: center;
  border-bottom: 3px solid #D4A843;
  margin: 0 0 12px 0;
}
.airr-card-main .score-value {
  font-size: 52px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #D4A843;
  line-height: 1;
  margin: 10px 0;
}
.airr-card-main .score-label {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1.5px;
  opacity: 0.8;
}
.airr-card-mini {
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 18px;
  text-align: center;
  background: #1A1A1A;
}
.airr-card-mini .score-value {
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1;
  margin: 5px 0;
}
.airr-card-mini .score-label {
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  opacity: 0.9;
}
.airr-card-mini.presence    { color: #27AE60; border-bottom: 2px solid #27AE60; }
.airr-card-mini.perception  { color: #D4A843; border-bottom: 2px solid #D4A843; }
.airr-card-mini.prestige    { color: #8E44AD; border-bottom: 2px solid #8E44AD; }
.airr-card-mini.persistence { color: #2980B9; border-bottom: 2px solid #2980B9; }
.airr-leaderboard {
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  margin: 16px 0 28px;
}
.airr-ldb-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a202c 0%, #2d3748 100%);
  gap: 6px;
}
.airr-ldb-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 9px 14px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
  gap: 6px;
  font-size: 13px;
}
.airr-ldb-rank {
  flex: 0 0 24px;
  height: 24px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 10px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.airr-ldb-name {
  flex: 1;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #2d3748;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}
.airr-ldb-airr {
  flex: 0 0 44px;
  text-align: right;
  font-size: 17px;
  font-weight: 800;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.airr-ldb-divider { flex: 0 0 1px; height: 24px; background: #e2e8f0; flex-shrink: 0; }
.airr-ldb-score {
  flex: 0 0 52px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #4a5568;
}
.airr-ldb-col-header {
  flex: 0 0 52px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 9px;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.8px;
  padding-bottom: 4px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid;
}
.airr-section-header {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  color: #718096;
  margin: 28px 0 12px;
  padding-bottom: 6px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #f0f0f0;
}
.persona-section {
  background: white;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 20px;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-top: 3px solid #8E44AD;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
}
.persona-section-header {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #2d3748;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.prompt-section {
  background: white;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 20px;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-top: 3px solid #667eea;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
}
.prompt-section-header {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #667eea;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  font-style: italic;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .airr-card-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .airr-card-main .score-value { font-size: 36px; }
  .airr-card-mini .score-value { font-size: 20px; }
  .airr-ldb-score  { flex: 0 0 36px; font-size: 10px; }
  .airr-ldb-col-header { flex: 0 0 36px; font-size: 8px; }
  .airr-ldb-airr   { flex: 0 0 34px; font-size: 13px; }
}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 10,
  fig.height = 5
)

library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
library(knitr)

con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  dbname   = Sys.getenv("DB_NAME"),
  host     = Sys.getenv("DB_HOST"),
  port     = as.integer(Sys.getenv("DB_PORT")),
  user     = Sys.getenv("DB_USER"),
  password = Sys.getenv("DB_PASSWORD")
)

login_id   <- params$login_id
brand_name <- params$brand_name

comp_colours <- c("#E74C3C","#3498DB","#2ECC71","#9B59B6",
                  "#E67E22","#1ABC9C","#34495E","#F39C12")

# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fmt <- function(val, digits = 1) {
  if (is.null(val) || length(val) == 0 || is.na(val) || val == 0)
    return("NA")
  as.character(round(val, digits))
}

val_col <- function(val) {
  if (is.null(val) || length(val) == 0 || is.na(val) || val == 0)
    return("#cbd5e0")
  if (val >= 70) "#48bb78" else if (val >= 40) "#ecc94b" else "#fc8181"
}

rank_style <- function(i) {
  switch(as.character(i),
    "1" = "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f6d365,#fda085);color:white;",
    "2" = "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c0c0c0,#e0e0e0);color:#555;",
    "3" = "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#cd7f32,#e6a566);color:white;",
    "background:#edf2f7;color:#718096;"
  )
}

# ── HTML builders — pure string concatenation ─────────────────────────
# Avoids all htmltools serialisation issues

h_div <- function(..., class = "", style = "") {
  inner <- paste(..., sep = "\n")
  paste0('<div',
         if (nzchar(class)) paste0(' class="', class, '"') else '',
         if (nzchar(style)) paste0(' style="', style, '"') else '',
         '>', inner, '</div>')
}

h_span <- function(..., class = "", style = "") {
  inner <- paste(..., sep = "")
  paste0('<span',
         if (nzchar(class)) paste0(' class="', class, '"') else '',
         if (nzchar(style)) paste0(' style="', style, '"') else '',
         '>', inner, '</span>')
}

# ── Score cards ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

render_score_cards_html <- function(airr, presence, perception,
                                     prestige, persistence) {
  main_card <- h_div(
    h_div("AiRR Score", class = "score-label"),
    h_div(fmt(airr),
          class = "score-value",
          style = paste0("color:", val_col(airr), ";")),
    class = "airr-card-main"
  )

  grid <- h_div(
    h_div(
      h_div("Presence",       class = "score-label"),
      h_div(fmt(presence),    class = "score-value"),
      class = "airr-card-mini presence"
    ),
    h_div(
      h_div("Perception",     class = "score-label"),
      h_div(fmt(perception),  class = "score-value"),
      class = "airr-card-mini perception"
    ),
    h_div(
      h_div("Prestige",       class = "score-label"),
      h_div(fmt(prestige),    class = "score-value"),
      class = "airr-card-mini prestige"
    ),
    h_div(
      h_div("Persistence",    class = "score-label"),
      h_div(fmt(persistence), class = "score-value"),
      class = "airr-card-mini persistence"
    ),
    class = "airr-card-grid"
  )

  cat(main_card, grid, sep = "\n")
}

# ── Leaderboard ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

render_leaderboard_html <- function(scores_df,
                                     accent_color   = "#D4A843",
                                     name_class     = "main") {

  scores_df <- scores_df %>%
    arrange(desc(airr_score)) %>%
    mutate(rank = row_number())

  rgb_str <- paste(col2rgb(accent_color), collapse = ",")

  # Header
  header <- paste0(
    '<div class="airr-ldb-header">',
    '<div class="airr-ldb-rank"></div>',
    '<div style="flex:1;">',
    h_span("Brand",
           style = paste0("color:#a0aec0;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;",
                          "text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;")),
    '</div>',
    '<div style="flex:0 0 44px;text-align:right;">',
    h_span("AiRR",
           style = paste0("color:#a0aec0;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;",
                          "text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;")),
    '</div>',
    '<div class="airr-ldb-divider" style="background:#4a5568;"></div>',
    '<div class="airr-ldb-col-header" ',
    'style="color:#27AE60;border-bottom-color:#27AE60;">Pres</div>',
    '<div class="airr-ldb-col-header" ',
    'style="color:#D4A843;border-bottom-color:#D4A843;">Perc</div>',
    '<div class="airr-ldb-col-header" ',
    'style="color:#8E44AD;border-bottom-color:#8E44AD;">Prest</div>',
    '<div class="airr-ldb-col-header" ',
    'style="color:#2980B9;border-bottom-color:#2980B9;">Pers</div>',
    '</div>'
  )

  # Rows
  rows <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(scores_df)), function(i) {
    row     <- scores_df[i, ]
    is_main <- isTRUE(row$main_brand_flag)

    row_style <- if (is_main) {
      paste0("border-left:3px solid ", accent_color, ";",
             "background:linear-gradient(90deg,",
             "rgba(", rgb_str, ",0.08) 0%,",
             "rgba(", rgb_str, ",0.02) 100%);")
    } else {
      "border-left:3px solid transparent;"
    }

    name_style <- if (is_main) {
      paste0("color:", accent_color, ";font-weight:700;")
    } else ""

    name_text <- if (is_main) {
      paste0("\u2605 ", row$brand_name)
    } else row$brand_name

    paste0(
      '<div class="airr-ldb-row" style="', row_style, '">',
      '<div class="airr-ldb-rank" style="', rank_style(i), '">', i, '</div>',
      '<div class="airr-ldb-name" style="', name_style, '">',
      name_text, '</div>',
      '<div class="airr-ldb-airr" style="color:',
      val_col(row$airr_score), ';">', fmt(row$airr_score), '</div>',
      '<div class="airr-ldb-divider"></div>',
      '<div class="airr-ldb-score">', fmt(row$presence_score),    '</div>',
      '<div class="airr-ldb-score">', fmt(row$perception_score),  '</div>',
      '<div class="airr-ldb-score">', fmt(row$prestige_score),    '</div>',
      '<div class="airr-ldb-score">', fmt(row$persistence_score), '</div>',
      '</div>'
    )
  })

  cat(paste0(
    '<div class="airr-leaderboard">',
    header,
    paste(rows, collapse = "\n"),
    '</div>\n'
  ))
}

# ── Trend chart ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

render_trend_chart <- function(ts_data,
                                y_col      = "airr_score",
                                y_title    = "AiRR Score",
                                main_color = "#D4A843") {
  p <- plot_ly()

  comp_ts <- ts_data %>% filter(!main_brand_flag)
  if (nrow(comp_ts) > 0) {
    for (i in seq_along(unique(comp_ts$brand_name))) {
      bn  <- unique(comp_ts$brand_name)[i]
      bd  <- comp_ts %>% filter(brand_name == bn)
      col <- comp_colours[((i - 1) %% length(comp_colours)) + 1]
      p   <- p %>% add_trace(
        data = bd, x = ~date, y = as.formula(paste0("~", y_col)),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers", name = bn,
        line   = list(width = 2, dash = "dot", color = col, shape = "spline"),
        marker = list(size = 4, color = col),
        opacity = 0.7,
        hovertemplate = paste0(
          "<b>", bn, "</b><br>%{x|%d %b %Y}<br>",
          y_title, ": <b>%{y:.1f}</b><extra></extra>")
      )
    }
  }

  main_ts <- ts_data %>% filter(main_brand_flag)
  if (nrow(main_ts) > 0) {
    p <- p %>% add_trace(
      data = main_ts, x = ~date, y = as.formula(paste0("~", y_col)),
      type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
      name = paste0("\u2605 ", brand_name),
      line   = list(width = 3.5, color = main_color, shape = "spline"),
      marker = list(size = 7, color = main_color,
                    line = list(color = "#1A1A1A", width = 1.5)),
      hovertemplate = paste0(
        "<b>\u2605 ", brand_name, "</b><br>%{x|%d %b %Y}<br>",
        y_title, ": <b>%{y:.1f}</b><extra></extra>")
    )
  }

  p %>% layout(
    xaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE,
                 tickfont = list(size = 11, color = "#9E9E9E")),
    yaxis = list(
      title     = list(text = y_title,
                       font = list(size = 12, color = "#9E9E9E")),
      range     = c(0, 100), showgrid = TRUE,
      gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0.05)"
    ),
    hovermode  = "closest",
    hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = "#1A1A1A", bordercolor = main_color,
                      font = list(size = 12, color = "#F5F5F0")),
    plot_bgcolor = "white", paper_bgcolor = "white",
    margin = list(l = 50, r = 20, t = 10, b = 40),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2,
                  font = list(size = 11, color = "#9E9E9E"),
                  bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)")
  ) %>% config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
}
```

```{r load-data, include=FALSE}
brands <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT b.brand_id, b.brand_name, ubt.main_brand_flag
  FROM fact_user_brands_tracked ubt
  JOIN dim_brand b ON b.brand_id = ubt.brand_id
  WHERE ubt.login_id = $1
    AND ubt.date_valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE
    AND (ubt.date_valid_to IS NULL OR ubt.date_valid_to >= CURRENT_DATE)
  ORDER BY ubt.main_brand_flag DESC, b.brand_name",
  params = list(login_id))

has_brands   <- nrow(brands) > 0
brand_ids    <- if (has_brands) brands$brand_id else integer(0)
n            <- length(brand_ids)
placeholders <- if (n > 0) paste0("$", 2:(n + 1), collapse = ", ") else NULL

latest_scores <- if (has_brands) {
  tryCatch(dbGetQuery(con, sprintf("
    WITH latest AS (
      SELECT brand_id, MAX(date) as latest_date
      FROM fact_airr_history
      WHERE login_id = $1 AND brand_id IN (%s)
      GROUP BY brand_id
    )
    SELECT db.brand_name, db.brand_id, fa.airr_score,
           fpres.overall_score  AS presence_score,
           fperc.perception_score, fprest.prestige_score,
           fpers.persistence_score, fa.date, ubt.main_brand_flag
    FROM dim_brand db
    INNER JOIN latest l ON db.brand_id = l.brand_id
    INNER JOIN fact_airr_history fa
      ON db.brand_id = fa.brand_id
      AND fa.date = l.latest_date AND fa.login_id = $1
    LEFT JOIN fact_presence_history fpres
      ON db.brand_id = fpres.brand_id
      AND fpres.date = l.latest_date AND fpres.login_id = $1
    LEFT JOIN fact_perception_history fperc
      ON db.brand_id = fperc.brand_id
      AND fperc.date = l.latest_date AND fperc.login_id = $1
    LEFT JOIN fact_prestige_history fprest
      ON db.brand_id = fprest.brand_id
      AND fprest.date = l.latest_date AND fprest.login_id = $1
    LEFT JOIN fact_persistence_history fpers
      ON db.brand_id = fpers.brand_id
      AND fpers.date = l.latest_date AND fpers.login_id = $1
    LEFT JOIN fact_user_brands_tracked ubt
      ON ubt.brand_id = db.brand_id AND ubt.login_id = $1
    ORDER BY fa.airr_score DESC", placeholders),
    params = as.list(c(login_id, brand_ids))),
  error = function(e) data.frame())
} else data.frame()

timeseries <- if (has_brands) {
  tryCatch(dbGetQuery(con, sprintf("
    SELECT db.brand_name, fa.date, fa.airr_score, ubt.main_brand_flag
    FROM fact_airr_history fa
    JOIN dim_brand db ON db.brand_id = fa.brand_id
    JOIN fact_user_brands_tracked ubt
      ON ubt.brand_id = fa.brand_id AND ubt.login_id = $1
    WHERE fa.login_id = $1 AND fa.brand_id IN (%s)
      AND fa.airr_score IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY db.brand_name, fa.date", placeholders),
    params = as.list(c(login_id, brand_ids))),
  error = function(e) data.frame())
} else data.frame()

queries <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT dq.query_id, dq.query_string
  FROM fact_user_queries_tracked uqt
  JOIN dim_query dq ON dq.query_id = uqt.query_id
  WHERE uqt.login_id = $1
    AND uqt.date_valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE
    AND (uqt.date_valid_to IS NULL OR uqt.date_valid_to > CURRENT_DATE)",
  params = list(login_id))

personas <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT upt.profile_id, dcp.profile_name
  FROM fact_user_profiles_tracked upt
  JOIN dim_customer_profile dcp ON dcp.profile_id = upt.profile_id
  WHERE upt.login_id = $1
    AND upt.date_valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE
    AND (upt.date_valid_to IS NULL OR upt.date_valid_to > CURRENT_DATE)",
  params = list(login_id))

main_scores <- if (nrow(latest_scores) > 0)
  latest_scores %>% filter(main_brand_flag == TRUE) else data.frame()
```

## `r brand_name` — Current Scores

```{r score-cards, results="asis"}
if (nrow(main_scores) > 0) {
  render_score_cards_html(
    airr        = main_scores$airr_score[1],
    presence    = main_scores$presence_score[1],
    perception  = main_scores$perception_score[1],
    prestige    = main_scores$prestige_score[1],
    persistence = main_scores$persistence_score[1]
  )
}
```

## Leaderboard

```{r leaderboard-cards, results="asis"}
if (nrow(latest_scores) > 0) {
  render_leaderboard_html(latest_scores)
}
```

## AiRR Score Over Time

```{r airr-timeseries}
if (nrow(timeseries) > 0) {
  render_trend_chart(timeseries, y_col = "airr_score",
                     y_title = "AiRR Score", main_color = "#D4A843")
}
```

```{r prompt-section, results="asis"}
if (nrow(queries) > 0 && length(brand_ids) > 0) {
  cat("\n## Prompt Scores\n\n")

  ph <- paste0("$", 2:(n + 1), collapse = ", ")

  for (q in seq_len(nrow(queries))) {
    qid     <- queries$query_id[q]
    qstring <- queries$query_string[q]

    prompt_scores <- tryCatch(
      dbGetQuery(con, sprintf("
        SELECT db.brand_name, fqh.date, fqh.airr_score,
               fqh.presence_score, fqh.perception_score,
               fqh.prestige_score, fqh.persistence_score,
               ubt.main_brand_flag
        FROM fact_query_history fqh
        JOIN dim_brand db ON db.brand_id = fqh.brand_id
        JOIN fact_user_brands_tracked ubt
          ON ubt.brand_id = fqh.brand_id AND ubt.login_id = $1
        WHERE fqh.query_id = $%d
          AND fqh.brand_id IN (%s)
          AND fqh.airr_score IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY db.brand_name, fqh.date",
        n + 2, ph),
        params = as.list(c(login_id, brand_ids, qid))),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (!is.null(prompt_scores) && nrow(prompt_scores) > 0) {

      latest_q <- prompt_scores %>%
        group_by(brand_name, main_brand_flag) %>%
        filter(date == max(date)) %>%
        ungroup()

      cat(paste0(
        '<div class="prompt-section">',
        '<div class="prompt-section-header">&ldquo;',
        qstring,
        '&rdquo;</div>'
      ))
      render_leaderboard_html(latest_q, accent_color = "#667eea",
                               name_class = "prompt-main")
      cat('</div>\n')

    } else {
      cat(sprintf("<p><em>No data for: %s</em></p>\n", qstring))
    }
  }
}
```

```{r prompt-charts, results="asis"}
if (nrow(queries) > 0 && length(brand_ids) > 0) {
  ph <- paste0("$", 2:(n + 1), collapse = ", ")

  for (q in seq_len(nrow(queries))) {
    qid     <- queries$query_id[q]
    qstring <- queries$query_string[q]

    prompt_scores <- tryCatch(
      dbGetQuery(con, sprintf("
        SELECT db.brand_name, fqh.date, fqh.airr_score,
               ubt.main_brand_flag
        FROM fact_query_history fqh
        JOIN dim_brand db ON db.brand_id = fqh.brand_id
        JOIN fact_user_brands_tracked ubt
          ON ubt.brand_id = fqh.brand_id AND ubt.login_id = $1
        WHERE fqh.query_id = $%d
          AND fqh.brand_id IN (%s)
          AND fqh.airr_score IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY db.brand_name, fqh.date",
        n + 2, ph),
        params = as.list(c(login_id, brand_ids, qid))),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (!is.null(prompt_scores) && nrow(prompt_scores) > 1) {
      cat(sprintf(
  '<p style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#667eea;margin-top:16px;">&ldquo;%s&rdquo;</p>\n',
  qstring))
      print(render_trend_chart(prompt_scores,
                               y_col      = "airr_score",
                               y_title    = "AiRR Score",
                               main_color = "#667eea"))
    }
  }
}
```

```{r persona-section, results="asis"}
if (nrow(personas) > 0 && length(brand_ids) > 0) {
  cat("\n## Customer Persona Scores\n\n")

  ph <- paste0("$", 2:(n + 1), collapse = ", ")

  for (p in seq_len(nrow(personas))) {
    pid   <- personas$profile_id[p]
    pname <- personas$profile_name[p]

    persona_scores <- tryCatch(
      dbGetQuery(con, sprintf("
        WITH latest AS (
          SELECT brand_id, MAX(date) as latest_date
          FROM fact_profile_brand_history
          WHERE profile_id = $1 AND brand_id IN (%s)
          GROUP BY brand_id
        )
        SELECT db.brand_name, fpbh.airr_score, fpbh.presence_score,
               fpbh.perception_score, fpbh.prestige_score,
               fpbh.persistence_score, ubt.main_brand_flag
        FROM fact_profile_brand_history fpbh
        JOIN dim_brand db ON db.brand_id = fpbh.brand_id
        JOIN latest l
          ON fpbh.brand_id = l.brand_id AND fpbh.date = l.latest_date
        JOIN fact_user_brands_tracked ubt
          ON ubt.brand_id = fpbh.brand_id AND ubt.login_id = $%d
        WHERE fpbh.profile_id = $1
        ORDER BY fpbh.airr_score DESC",
        ph, n + 2),
        params = as.list(c(pid, brand_ids, login_id))),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    persona_ts <- tryCatch(
      dbGetQuery(con, sprintf("
        SELECT db.brand_name, fpbh.date, fpbh.airr_score, ubt.main_brand_flag
        FROM fact_profile_brand_history fpbh
        JOIN dim_brand db ON db.brand_id = fpbh.brand_id
        JOIN fact_user_brands_tracked ubt
          ON ubt.brand_id = fpbh.brand_id AND ubt.login_id = $%d
        WHERE fpbh.profile_id = $1
          AND fpbh.brand_id IN (%s)
          AND fpbh.airr_score IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY db.brand_name, fpbh.date",
        n + 2, ph),
        params = as.list(c(pid, brand_ids, login_id))),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    main_p <- if (!is.null(persona_scores) && nrow(persona_scores) > 0)
      persona_scores %>% filter(main_brand_flag == TRUE) else data.frame()

    # Open persona card
    cat(paste0(
      '<div class="persona-section">',
      '<div class="persona-section-header">&#128101; ', pname, '</div>'
    ))

    # Score cards for main brand
    if (nrow(main_p) > 0) {
      render_score_cards_html(
        airr        = main_p$airr_score[1],
        presence    = main_p$presence_score[1],
        perception  = main_p$perception_score[1],
        prestige    = main_p$prestige_score[1],
        persistence = main_p$persistence_score[1]
      )
    }

    # Leaderboard
    if (!is.null(persona_scores) && nrow(persona_scores) > 0) {
      render_leaderboard_html(persona_scores, accent_color = "#8E44AD")
    } else {
      cat('<p style="color:#a0aec0;font-size:13px;">No persona data available.</p>')
    }

    # Persona prompt scores
    if (nrow(queries) > 0) {
      cat(sprintf(
        '<div class="airr-section-header">%s &mdash; Prompt Scores</div>\n',
        pname))

      qph <- paste0("$", 3:(n + 2), collapse = ", ")

      for (q in seq_len(nrow(queries))) {
        qid     <- queries$query_id[q]
        qstring <- queries$query_string[q]

        pp_scores <- tryCatch(
          dbGetQuery(con, sprintf("
            WITH latest AS (
              SELECT fpqh.brand_id, MAX(fpqh.date) as latest_date
              FROM fact_profile_query_history fpqh
              WHERE fpqh.profile_id = $1
                AND fpqh.query_id   = $2
                AND fpqh.brand_id  IN (%s)
              GROUP BY fpqh.brand_id
            )
            SELECT db.brand_name, fpqh.airr_score, fpqh.presence_score,
                   fpqh.perception_score, fpqh.prestige_score,
                   fpqh.persistence_score, ubt.main_brand_flag
            FROM fact_profile_query_history fpqh
            JOIN dim_brand db ON db.brand_id = fpqh.brand_id
            JOIN latest l
              ON fpqh.brand_id = l.brand_id AND fpqh.date = l.latest_date
            JOIN fact_user_brands_tracked ubt
              ON ubt.brand_id = fpqh.brand_id AND ubt.login_id = $%d
            WHERE fpqh.profile_id = $1
              AND fpqh.query_id   = $2
            ORDER BY fpqh.airr_score DESC",
            qph, n + 3),
            params = as.list(c(pid, qid, brand_ids, login_id))),
          error = function(e) NULL
        )

        if (!is.null(pp_scores) && nrow(pp_scores) > 0) {
          cat(paste0(
            '<div class="prompt-section">',
            '<div class="prompt-section-header">&ldquo;',
            qstring, '&rdquo;</div>'
          ))
          render_leaderboard_html(pp_scores, accent_color = "#8E44AD")
          cat('</div>\n')
        }
      }
    }

    # Close persona card
    cat('</div>\n')
  }
}
```

```{r persona-charts, results="asis"}
if (nrow(personas) > 0 && length(brand_ids) > 0) {
  ph <- paste0("$", 2:(n + 1), collapse = ", ")

  for (p in seq_len(nrow(personas))) {
    pid   <- personas$profile_id[p]
    pname <- personas$profile_name[p]

    persona_ts <- tryCatch(
      dbGetQuery(con, sprintf("
        SELECT db.brand_name, fpbh.date, fpbh.airr_score, ubt.main_brand_flag
        FROM fact_profile_brand_history fpbh
        JOIN dim_brand db ON db.brand_id = fpbh.brand_id
        JOIN fact_user_brands_tracked ubt
          ON ubt.brand_id = fpbh.brand_id AND ubt.login_id = $%d
        WHERE fpbh.profile_id = $1
          AND fpbh.brand_id IN (%s)
          AND fpbh.airr_score IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY db.brand_name, fpbh.date",
        n + 2, ph),
        params = as.list(c(pid, brand_ids, login_id))),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (!is.null(persona_ts) && nrow(persona_ts) > 1) {
      cat(sprintf(
  '<p style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#8E44AD;margin-top:16px;">&#128101; %s \u2014 Score Over Time</p>\n',
  pname))
      print(render_trend_chart(persona_ts, y_col = "airr_score",
                               y_title = "AiRR Score",
                               main_color = "#8E44AD"))
    }
  }
}
```

```{r cleanup, include=FALSE}
dbDisconnect(con)
```

---

*Generated by AiRR &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; `r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC")`*
